headline: Will Baker Hughes (BKR) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: Baker Hughes (BKR) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.
